basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nitc.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: First class in B.Tech/B.E. in ECE or closely allied areas OR M.Sc. in Statistics/Computer Science with First Class. B.Sc. in Mathematics/Statistics/Computer Science with first class. Desirable: M.Tech in Signal Processing/Telecommunication/ECE/Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning/Data Science or allied areas, First class in B.Tech/B.E. in ECE or closely allied areas
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate (Position 1 - 3 year): First class in B.Tech/B.E. in ECE or closely allied areas OR M.Sc. in Statistics/Computer Science with First Class. B.Sc. in Mathematics/Statistics/Computer Science with first class. Desirable: M.Tech in Signal Processing/Telecommunication/ECE/Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning/Data Science or allied areas. Area of work: Application of Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Probabilistic ML, Artificial Intelligence to Electronic Warfare. Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate (Position 2 - 2 year): First class in B.Tech/B.E. in ECE or closely allied areas. Area of work: System/Prototype development for Electronic Warfare.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate (Position 1 & 2): JRF: GATE/NET Qualified: ₹37,000 + 20% HRA pm Project Associate -I: Non-GATE/NET qualified: ₹30,000 + 20% HRA pm Project Associate -II: Non-GATE/NET qualified with 2 years of experience: ₹33,000 + 20% HRA pm

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Calicut Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Calicut to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Calicut Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Calicut Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate (Position 1 - 3 year): First class in B.Tech/B.E. in ECE or closely allied areas OR M.Sc. in Statistics/Computer Science with First Class. B.Sc. in Mathematics/Statistics/Computer Science with first class. Desirable: M.Tech in Signal Processing/Telecommunication/ECE/Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning/Data Science or allied areas. Area of work: Application of Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Probabilistic ML, Artificial Intelligence to Electronic Warfare. Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate (Position 2 - 2 year): First class in B.Tech/B.E. in ECE or closely allied areas. Area of work: System/Prototype development for Electronic Warfare.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate (Position 1 & 2): JRF: GATE/NET Qualified: ₹37,000 + 20% HRA pm Project Associate -I: Non-GATE/NET qualified: ₹30,000 + 20% HRA pm Project Associate -II: Non-GATE/NET qualified with 2 years of experience: ₹33,000 + 20% HRA pm

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Calicut Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Calicut to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Calicut recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate posts at NIT Calicut is 08-07-2026. Ensure you submit your application well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate positions at the National Institute of Technology Calicut.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a First Class in B.Tech/B.E. in ECE or allied areas, or M.Sc. in Statistics/Computer Science with First Class, or B.Sc. in Mathematics/Statistics/Computer Science with First Class. A Master's degree in specific fields is desirable for one position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from ₹30,000 + 20% HRA per month for Project Associate-I (non-GATE/NET) to ₹37,000 + 20% HRA per month for JRF (GATE/NET qualified).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by NIT Calicut.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the NIT Calicut recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an online interview, followed by shortlisting of candidates and document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application process for the NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate positions is strictly online.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the tentative date for the online interview?
faq.answer: The tentative date for the online interview for the shortlisted candidates is 10-07-2026.

faq.question: Q10. Does NIT Calicut offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories, as it is not explicitly mentioned in the provided summary.
